message:
stage 1 phase D.4: softmax_f32 kernel

Row-wise f32 softmax with max-subtract for numerical stability. Three
passes: max, exp+sum, normalize. Scalar exp per lane — WASM has no
vector exp; Zig's @exp uses its freestanding software exp.

Tested against PyTorch F.softmax on two shapes:
- attention: [8, 257] (8 queries × window 128+128+1 sink)
- topk: [16, 4] (router top-4)

Both within 1e-5 relative / 1e-7 absolute. maxRel ~5e-7 on attention
shape, ~2e-7 on topk — well inside the tolerance.

files.patch:
@@ -134,6 +134,22 @@ def main() -> int:
     write(FIXTURES_DIR / "embed_ids.i32", ids.numpy().tobytes())
     write(FIXTURES_DIR / "embed_out.bf16", bf16_bytes(y_embed))
 
+    # ----- Softmax fixture (attention-shape) -----
+    #
+    # Shape picked to exercise both the "long" row (attention scores +
+    # sink = window*2 + 1 cells) and a small even one (router top-k).
+    torch.manual_seed(SEED + 5)
+    x_sm_att = torch.randn(8, 257, dtype=torch.float32) * 3.0  # spread logits
+    y_sm_att = F.softmax(x_sm_att, dim=-1)
+    write(FIXTURES_DIR / "softmax_att_x.f32", x_sm_att.numpy().tobytes())
+    write(FIXTURES_DIR / "softmax_att_y.f32", y_sm_att.numpy().tobytes())
+
+    torch.manual_seed(SEED + 6)
+    x_sm_top = torch.randn(16, 4, dtype=torch.float32)
+    y_sm_top = F.softmax(x_sm_top, dim=-1)
+    write(FIXTURES_DIR / "softmax_topk_x.f32", x_sm_top.numpy().tobytes())
+    write(FIXTURES_DIR / "softmax_topk_y.f32", y_sm_top.numpy().tobytes())
+
     # ----- RoPE yarn apply fixture -----
     #
     # Runs the upstream `OpenAIPrivacyFilterRotaryEmbedding` layer once

@@ -50,6 +50,24 @@
       "abs_tol": 1e-4,
       "note": "bf16 output of an fp32 matmul over dequantized int4 (block 32, sym, fp16 scale). Expected bounded by bf16 ULP (~4e-3 rel for unit-ish values) plus int4 quant error; 1e-3 rel is tight for this combo."
     },
+    {
+      "name": "softmax_f32",
+      "x": "softmax_att_x.f32",
+      "expected": "softmax_att_y.f32",
+      "rows": 8,
+      "cols": 257,
+      "rel_tol": 1e-5,
+      "abs_tol": 1e-7
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "softmax_f32",
+      "x": "softmax_topk_x.f32",
+      "expected": "softmax_topk_y.f32",
+      "rows": 16,
+      "cols": 4,
+      "rel_tol": 1e-5,
+      "abs_tol": 1e-7
+    },
     {
       "name": "rope_apply",
       "qk_in": "rope_qk_in.bf16",
